productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Printed Black Tshirts
description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a crew neck, short sleeves, tattoo art printed on the back and chest, and the year '58' printed on the right sleeveFittingSlimWash careMachine wash in cold water with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry on lowDo not iron on embellishmentsChristian Audigier is a worldwide fashion icon who continues to build his fashion empire.
